title: Quanta Services (PWR) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
text: Quanta Services (PWR) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Quanta Services Announces First Quarter 2022 Earnings Release & Conference Call Schedule
text: HOUSTON , April 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE: PWR) announced today that it will release first quarter 2022 financial results on Thursday, May 5, 2022, before the market opens. In conjunction with the press release, Quanta has scheduled a conference call and webcast for 9:00 a.m.
